2604.18258.title: Long-Text-to-Image Generation via Compositional Prompt Decomposition
2604.18258.paper_summary: While modern text-to-image (T2I) models excel at generating images from intricate prompts, they struggle to capture the key details when the inputs are descriptive paragraphs. This limitation stems from the prevalence of concise captions that shape their training distributions. Existing methods attempt to bridge this gap by either fine-tuning T2I models on long prompts, which generalizes poorly to longer lengths; or by projecting the oversize inputs into normal-prompt space and compromising fidelity. We propose Prompt Refraction for Intricate Scene Modeling (PRISM), a compositional approach that enables pre-trained T2I models to process long sequence inputs. PRISM uses a lightweight module to extract constituent representations from the long prompts. The T2I model makes independent noise predictions for each component, and their outputs are merged into a single denoising step using energy-based conjunction. We evaluate PRISM across a wide range of model architectures, showing comparable performances to models fine-tuned on the same training data. Furthermore, PRISM demonstrates superior generalization, outperforming baseline models by 7.4% on prompts over 500 tokens in a challenging public benchmark.
2604.18258.paper_summary_zh: 雖然現代的文本到圖像（T2I）模型在從複雜提示生成圖像方面表現出色，但當輸入為描述性段落時，它們在捕捉關鍵細節方面卻面臨挑戰。這一限制源於簡潔標題的普遍存在，這些標題塑造了它們的訓練分佈。現有的方法試圖通過微調T2I模型以處理長提示來彌補這一差距，但這在較長的長度上泛化效果不佳；或者通過將過大的輸入投影到正常提示空間來妥協保真度。我們提出了複雜場景建模的提示折射（PRISM），這是一種組合方法，使預訓練的T2I模型能夠處理長序列輸入。PRISM使用輕量級模塊從長提示中提取組成表示。T2I模型為每個組件進行獨立的噪聲預測，並使用基於能量的聯合將它們的輸出合併為單個去噪步驟。我們在各種模型架構上評估PRISM，顯示出與在相同訓練數據上微調的模型相當的性能。此外，PRISM展示了卓越的泛化能力，在一個具有挑戰性的公共基準測試中，對於超過500個標記的提示，其表現超過了基準模型7.4%。
2604.18258.author: Jen-Yuan Huang et.al.
2604.18258.authors: Jen-Yuan Huang, Tong Lin, Yilun Du
